style_effects: Subtle heat haze curls from Magikarp's metallic joints, reflecting distorted cityscapes in its polished armor. Glowing blue energy pulses rhythmically through its seam lines, accompanied by swirling metallic dust particles that catch the light. A cool, intense blue aura radiates in sharp geometric waves around its body, casting a crisp, icy glow on the surrounding water. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
